name: Banana Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mashed ripe bananas (2 to 3 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form; set aside.
2. Cream shortening and sugar in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg yolks; mix well.
4. Add mashed bananas and combine flour and baking soda; add to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Gently fold in egg whites into the batter.
7. Fold in chopped walnuts if desired.
8. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 13-in x 9-in x 2-in baking pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
11. Garnish with whipped cream and sliced bananas, if desired.
